title: Nicola Spring Coir Door Mat - 90 x 60cm - Hello - Pack of 1 - Decorative Indoor Front Door Floor Mat Entry Dirt Trapper Rug Outdoor Boot Scraper Non Slip Backing Doormat
features: Eco-Friendly, Durable Coir Fibres - Made from natural coconut fibres, these mats offer a sturdy, sustainable option for keeping entryways clean, combining eco-friendly materials with exceptional durability to withstand heavy foot traffic.

Efficient Dirt and Moisture Trapping - The stiff coir bristles effectively scrub away dirt, mud, and dust from shoes, while a non-slip PVC backing traps moisture, helping keep floors and carpets dry and free from outside debris.

Vibrant Multicoloured Leaf Design - Featuring a striking, vibrant leaf pattern, these mats add a warm, inviting touch to any entryway, seamlessly blending style with functionality and enhancing the look of porches, mudrooms, and doorways.

Available in Two Sizes for Any Space - Choose between two practical sizes (40 x 60cm and 60 x 90cm) to suit any entry space, whether it’s a small apartment door, a spacious porch, or a high-traffic mudroom, offering versatile use in any setting.

Simple and Quick Cleaning - Maintaining these mats is easy—just shake out dust and mud, beat it outdoors, or brush with water before letting it dry flat. This simple care routine keeps them looking fresh and welcoming, ready to greet guests season after season.
description: Product description The range of Natural Coir Non-Slip Door Mats from Nicola Spring offers a quick and easy way to show off your personality, and create an inviting home environment for your guests right from their very first step inside. Crafted from natural coir coconut fibres, these welcome mats provide an innate strength and durability that is perfectly suited to brushing dirt, dust, mud and muck from the soles of your shoes. A non-slip PVC backing traps moisture and water, while keeping your interior carpets protected. Coming in two sizes - 40 x 60cm and 60 x 90cm - this doormat comes adorned with a gorgeous, handwritten-style “Hello” message that is sure to feel at home in a wide variety of decor styles. To clean, simply beat while hanging outside with a sturdy broom handle, then brush through with a small amount of water before laying flat to dry. With the Nicola Spring collection of Natural Coir Non-Slip Welcome Mats, your door is always open. Shop the range today. Safety Warning May cause allergic reactions in some individuals. Avoid exposure to high heat to prevent potential gas emission from the non-slip backing.
